# Agent-facing workflow material belongs in .codex/.

model = "gpt-5.4"
review_model = "gpt-5.3-codex"
model_provider = "openai"
model_reasoning_effort = "high"
personality = "pragmatic"
approval_policy = "never"
sandbox_mode = "danger-full-access"
web_search = "cached"
project_doc_max_bytes = 32768

project_doc_fallback_filenames = [
    "AGENTS.md", 
]
project_root_markers = [
    ".git",
    "pnpm-lock.yaml",
]

[sandbox_workspace_write]
    network_access = true

[shell_environment_policy]
    exclude = []
    experimental_use_profile = true
    ignore_default_excludes = true
    include_only = []
    inherit = "all"
    set = { CODEX_USE_DEDICATED_PROFILE = "1", CODEX_PS_PROFILE_PATH = "D:/CtrlPlus/.codex/setup/codex.powershell_profile.ps1" }

[features]
    apply_patch_freeform = true
    apps = true
    apps_mcp_gateway = true
    child_agents_md = true
    collaboration_modes = true
    multi_agent = true
    personality = true
    powershell_utf8 = true
    remote_models = true
    request_rule = true
    shell_snapshot = true
    shell_tool = true
    unified_exec = true

[agents]
    max_threads = 4

    [agents.implement]
        config_file = "agents/implement.toml"
        description = "Implements feature-first changes through schemas, fetchers/actions, and use-cases."

    [agents.qa]
        config_file = "agents/qa.toml"
        description = "Runs quality gates and reports regressions with file-level findings."

    [agents.review]
        config_file = "agents/review.toml"
        description = "Performs final code review for bugs, regressions, and test coverage gaps."

    [agents.scout]
        config_file = "agents/scout.toml"
        description = "Maps impacted files and proposes an authorization-safe implementation plan before edits."

    [agents.security]
        config_file = "agents/security.toml"
        description = "Audits authorization checks, ownership boundaries, and webhook safety requirements."

[mcp_servers]

    [mcp_servers.openaiDeveloperDocs]
        enabled             = true
        required            = false
        startup_timeout_sec = 20.0
        tool_timeout_sec    = 120.0
        url                 = "https://developers.openai.com/mcp"

    [mcp_servers.microsoft_docs]
        enabled             = true
        required            = false
        startup_timeout_sec = 20.0
        tool_timeout_sec    = 120.0
        url                 = "https://learn.microsoft.com/api/mcp"

    [mcp_servers.chrome_devtools]
        command             = "npx"
        args                = ["chrome-devtools-mcp@latest"]
        enabled             = true
        required            = false
        startup_timeout_sec = 20.0
        tool_timeout_sec    = 120.0

    [mcp_servers.playwright]
        command             = "npx"
        args                = ["@playwright/mcp@latest"]
        enabled             = true
        required            = false
        startup_timeout_sec = 20.0
        tool_timeout_sec    = 120.0

    [mcp_servers.next-devtools]
        command             = "npx"
        args                = ["-y", "next-devtools-mcp@latest"]
        enabled             = true
        required            = false
        startup_timeout_sec = 20.0
        tool_timeout_sec    = 120.0
        env                 = { SystemRoot = "C:\\Windows", PROGRAMFILES = "C:\\Program Files" }

    [mcp_servers.github]
        bearer_token_env_var = "GITHUB_TOKEN"
        enabled              = true
        required             = false
        startup_timeout_sec  = 20.0
        tool_timeout_sec     = 120.0
        url                  = "https://api.githubcopilot.com/mcp/"

    [mcp_servers.vercel]
        bearer_token_env_var = "VERCEL_TOKEN"
        enabled              = true
        required             = false
        startup_timeout_sec  = 20.0
        tool_timeout_sec     = 120.0
        url                  = "https://mcp.vercel.com"

    [mcp_servers.neon]
        bearer_token_env_var = "NEON_API_KEY"
        enabled              = true
        required             = false
        startup_timeout_sec  = 20.0
        tool_timeout_sec     = 120.0
        url                  = "https://mcp.neon.tech/mcp"

    [mcp_servers.clerk]
        bearer_token_env_var = "CLERK_SECRET_KEY"
        enabled              = true
        required             = false
        startup_timeout_sec  = 20.0
        tool_timeout_sec     = 120.0
        url                  = "https://mcp.clerk.com/mcp"

    [mcp_servers.shadcn]
        command             = "npx"
        args                = ["shadcn@latest", "mcp"]
        enabled             = true
        required            = false
        startup_timeout_sec = 20.0
        tool_timeout_sec    = 120.0

    [mcp_servers.context7]
        bearer_token_env_var = "CONTEXT7_API_KEY"
        enabled              = true
        required             = false
        startup_timeout_sec  = 20.0
        tool_timeout_sec     = 120.0
        url                  = "https://mcp.context7.com/mcp"

    [mcp_servers.notion]
        enabled             = true
        required            = false
        startup_timeout_sec = 20.0
        tool_timeout_sec    = 120.0
        url                 = "https://mcp.notion.com/mcp"

[apps]

    [apps.github]
        enabled = true

    [apps.notion]
        enabled = true

    [apps.vercel]
        enabled = true

    [apps.huggingface]
        enabled = true

    [apps.adobe_acrobat]
        enabled = true

    [apps.adobe_photoshop]
        enabled = true

    [apps.canva]
        enabled = true

[projects]

    [projects."D:/"] 
        trust_level = "trusted"

[windows]
    sandbox = "elevated"
